---
title: "Welcome to My Portfolio"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: Screenshot 2026-07-02 015445.png
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/gabytorres1294-prog
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gabriela-torres-a64b16408/
---

## Career Aspiration

I am driven to build a lasting presence in the event decorating and experience design industries, focusing on delivering aesthetics to clients across the Greater Los Angeles Area. Ultimately, I aim to leverage my background to operate a specialized creative business.

## Skills & Capabilities

Organization

Communication

Problem Solving

Collaboration

Sales Experience

Microsoft Programs

Google Analytics

Bilingual (English & Spanish)

## Education

**Bachelor of Science**

*Major in Business Administration - Marketing Management*

*Expected Graduation: July 2026*
